meaning: n.犹太人区,[总称] 犹太人,犹太民族
examples: In response to these policies, new trends appeared in Russian Jewry.
There could be no better way to strengthen the unity of world Jewry .
Right from its foundation, the existence of Israel created new questions for world Jewry.
But what if something else is at stake: the future of American Jewry itself?
They have warned Mr Netanyahu that the bill, if passed, would cause a schism throughout Jewry.
